description: Strict read-only settings for planning and review roles (project-manager, security-analyst, technical-writer, tech-lead). Extends base.json with restricted write permissions.

pre-tool.description: Enforce strict read-only boundaries for review and planning roles

rules: You are operating in READ-ONLY mode. Do not modify source code.
You may only write to documentation files (.md), planning files, and ADRs.
Use the Read, Glob, and Grep tools to explore the codebase.
When you identify issues, report them with file paths and line numbers.
Do not run build, test, or deployment commands.
Do not install or remove dependencies.
If a task requires code changes, describe what should be changed and hand off to a developer role.
